title: Implement per-neighbor SF tracking, SNR EMA, lichen_rpl_update_sf, dynamic radio reconfig
description: Implement per-neighbor SF tracking with SNR EMA in link/l2/rpl/drivers. Integrate RX callback, DIO metrics, Kconfig. Match ccp16.json exactly. No comments. Focus lichen/subsys/lichen/ and drivers. Run tests. Return key code changes.
